textByHash.0ae5d5ec21bdc457be8cc6972d7f373c80c85e30: ...but when I woke up the next morning, they'd stolen my sword!
textByHash.478e927f3b156497a577187b35dc54c9d1e2203f: You're more than welcome to it, for getting our belongings back.
textByHash.6e41b23932142ed164f6a98e0861799ba592e958: I told them to get lost, of course...
textByHash.850f5830a3bc11c0b36dd1d0c1ed729d3aade0b9: So it's a family heirloom, you see.
textByHash.9e9a6ac80b94f4f708f28e3f8e81bc504a80a678: Thank you for finding my sword for me. Did you find everyone's belongings?
textByHash.a1cec996da1643ea1a268d6aa6e855f923751cbd: Only a few days ago, we had Miscellanian soldiers come round and ask for tribute.
textByHash.d843a3a2e3f29af1a61fb2575029d00aa6a2b01a: Could you get it back for me? I doubt it can cut anything, but it once belonged to my great-grandfather.
